title: festuca neopersica
intro: Festuca neopersica, also known as Persian meadow-grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to Iran and has been traditionally used in medicine for its various health benefits. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to have medicinal properties in treating various ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems. Festuca nepersica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine and herbal remedies.
